1748180.name: Unsung Empires: The Cholas
1748180.description:
Every epic journey leaves a legacy, and thanks for being a part of ours

As we are closing this chapter, we are grateful to have shared this experience of Rajendra Chola through

“Unsung Empires: The Cholas”

Join Rajendra Chola in Thanjavur on his next adventure “Unsung Empires: The Cholas II Legacy of Rajendra Chola”

Releasing soon in 2025, it is now available to Wishlist.

In this single-player, narrative-driven 3D action game, Experience the greatness of the Chola dynasty you take on the character Rajendra Chola, one of the most powerful kings of Tamil Nadu. The prologue follows his journey of Srivijaya, where Rajendra Chola sets out on a mission to establish trade routes far and wide. However, there's a problem that arises when the king of Srivijaya, Sangrama closes all the trade routes for Chola’s fleet. Your main mission in the first prologue is to reach the top of the mountain and strategically set up a camp.

In the finale, you will stay undercover while entering the city and face new challenges. This finale will lead you to the final boss fight with Sangrama.

Experience a unique story


Immerse yourself in the world where you will lose yourself in the rich lore of the great dynasty. You as Rajendra Chola will have to fight for what's his. When he ascended the throne in 1000 BC after his great father Rajaraja Chola, Rajendra Chola managed to gather one of the biggest naval fleets with a massive trade connection during his reign but he faces his greatest challenge yet.

The king of Srivijaya Sangrama has blocked his trade route. He must teach him a lesson he will never forget. Along the way, he will meet allies, enemies, friends, & foes and discover secrets and mysteries that will change his destiny.

Experience richly crafted visuals and authentic music


Crafted with realistic graphics to showcase the vibrant environment of Srivijaya. Experience the authentic Tamil music made with unique ancient instruments which captures the mood and spirit of each scene and gives you the feeling of being there and pride in Tamil culture. The game's environment is carefully made, focusing on the historical significance of architecture, people, and surroundings.

Encounter thrilling challenges and engaging gameplay


Involve in some exceptional challenges that come your way, escape from the eyes of soldiers and excel in the combats with swords and bows/arrows. You can use sneaky stealth techniques to assassinate the enemy. The gameplay mechanics in this game are both challenging and rewarding.
